title: Lyrran's MagiCraft
description: Cobblemon, magic, adventure and good ol' fashion home building! You'll love this!
body:
Built as a passion project for my daughter, I was putting together some of my favorite mods for building, magic and adventure. Ice and Fire, Biomes A Plenty, Chef's Delight, Cobblemon, and Doggy Talents Next along so many decoration mods!

I hope you will enjoy it as much as my friends and family have. Thank you for considering us!

-Lyrran and Kiki!

P.S. We usually post a few updates at a time. If there are any issues, let me know. I get excited at times and create a new version then test it afterwards--not the best idea admittedly.
